/usr/bin/clang++ -g CMakeFiles/cad_test.dir/cad_test_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cad_test.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o cad_test  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Sql.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpq.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
